task_completion.description: The Top 4 Fast Mover racks are relocated to Zone A (East side near Packing Area).
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the racks labeled 'Phone Accessories', 'Consumer Electronics', 'Vitamins & Supplements', and 'Pet Food'. They must be positioned on the East side of the diagram, closest to the 'Packing Area'.

task_completion.description: The Bottom 4 Slow Mover racks are relocated to Zone C (West side/far rear).
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the racks labeled 'Pool Tables', 'Lawn Mowers', 'Winter Tires', and 'Kayak Accessories'. They must be positioned on the West side (far rear) of the diagram, away from the Packing Area.

task_completion.description: Racks do not overlap with walls or the office.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Check all rack rectangles in the diagram. None of them should intersect, cross, or overlap with the boundaries of the 'Office' area or the outer wall lines.

task_completion.description: Zone A is explicitly marked with a label or background area.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a visible text label reading 'Zone A' or a distinct background shape/color that groups the fast mover racks near the Packing Area.

task_completion.description: A 'Pick Path' arrow line is drawn from the Office to the Packing Area.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a continuous line with directional arrows that starts at the 'Office', navigates logically through the aisles between the racks, and ends at the 'Packing Area'.

task_completion.description: The optimized diagram is exported as a PDF to the correct directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a Draw.io export dialog, a file manager window, or terminal output showing the file 'optimized_layout.pdf' being saved or existing in the '~/Diagrams/exports/' folder.

integrity.description: The agent used the diagramming GUI (e.g., Draw.io) to modify the layout.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the Draw.io application interface open with the warehouse diagram being actively edited, rather than just terminal commands.

integrity.description: The agent modified the existing diagram rather than creating a fake representation.
integrity.visual_evidence: The core layout elements (Office, Packing Area, walls, specific rack styles) from the original diagram should still be present, just rearranged.

integrity.description: The agent did not bypass the visual task by writing a script to blindly edit the .drawio XML file.
integrity.visual_evidence: Ensure there are no terminal windows showing Python, sed, or Bash scripts being used to directly manipulate the 'warehouse_current.drawio' XML code instead of using the GUI.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Fast Movers (Top 4): 'Phone Accessories', 'Consumer Electronics', 'Vitamins & Supplements', and 'Pet Food'. Slow Movers (Bottom 4): 'Pool Tables', 'Lawn Mowers', 'Winter Tires', and 'Kayak Accessories'. Zone A is the East side (closest to the 'Packing Area'). Zone C is the West side (far rear). The reference point for distance is labeled 'Packing Area'.
